faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about our products
faq.q1: What do I get after purchase?
faq.a1: After purchase, you'll receive full source files of the product (source code) that you can download and deploy. A download link will be sent to your email.
faq.q2: What are the differences between licenses?
faq.a2: Personal license allows use in one personal project. Commercial license allows use in commercial projects and for clients without limits.
faq.q3: How long can I download the files?
faq.a3: The download link is valid for 7 days from purchase. You can download the files up to 5 times within this period.
faq.a4: We accept all popular payment methods via PayU: BLIK, payment cards (Visa, Mastercard), bank transfers.
faq.a5: Yes, contact us after purchase with your order number and we'll issue a VAT invoice.
